RunSynchronousCommand.Path: cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:@echo off&echo:call :print ^"Setting keyboard layout for PE session^"&echo:wpeutil.exe SetKeyboardLayout 0c09:00000409&echo:for ^%^%d in (C D E F G H I J K L M N O P Q T U V X Y Z^) do ()
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.wim set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.wim^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.esd set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.esd^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.swm set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.swm^" ^& set ^"SWM_PARAM=/SWMFile:^%^%d:\sources\install*.swm^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\autounattend.xml set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%d:\autounattend.xml^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$OEM$ set ^"OEM_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$OEM$^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$ set ^"PEDRIVERS_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$^"&echo:^))
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3^" ^%^%t in ('reg.exe query HKLM\System\Setup /v UnattendFile 2^^^>nul'^) do ( if exist ^%^%t set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%t^" ^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if not defined IMAGE_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate install.wim, install.esd or install.swm.^"&echo:if not defined XML_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate autounattend.xml.^"&echo:set ^"OS_VERSION=11^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3 delims=.^" ^%^%v in ('ver'^) do (&echo:if ^%^%v LSS 20000 set ^"OS_VERSION=10^"&echo:^)&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER (&echo:call :print ^"Loading drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /R ^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^% ^%^%f IN (*.inf^) do drvload.exe ^"^%^%f^"&echo:^)&echo:^>X:\assert.vbs (&echo:echo:Function Fail(message^^^)&echo:echo:WScript.Echo message&echo:echo:WScript.Quit 1&echo:echo:End Function)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:On Error Resume Next&echo:echo:Set wmi = GetObject(^^^"winmgmts:\\.\root\cimv2^^^"^^^)&echo:echo:Set drive = wmi.Get(^^^"Win32_DiskDrive.DeviceID='\\.\PHYSICALDRIVE0'^^^"^^^)&echo:echo:If Err.Number ^^^<^^^> 0 Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Could not locate disk 0 (^^^" ^^^& Err.Description ^^^& ^^^"^^^).^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^)&echo:echo:expected = 100)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:If actual ^^^< expected Then&echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at least ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^)&echo:echo:expected = 4000&echo:echo:If actual ^^^> expected Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at most ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = drive.Partitions&echo:echo:If actual ^^^> 0 Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"There are already ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" partitions on disk 0.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:WScript.Echo ^^^"Disk assertions were satisfied.^^^"&echo:echo:WScript.Quit 0&echo:^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Running disk assertions^"&echo:cscript.exe //E:vbscript ^"X:\assert.vbs^" //Nologo ^|^| call :fail ^"Disk assertion failed. Windows Setup will halt to avoid potential data loss.^"&echo:^>X:\GPT.txt ()

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:SELECT DISK=0&echo:echo:CLEAN&echo:echo:CONVERT GPT&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION EFI SIZE=300&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=FAT32 LABEL=^^^"System^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=S&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION MSR SIZE=16)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY&echo:echo:SHRINK MINIMUM=1000&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Windows^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=W&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Recovery^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=R&echo:echo:SET ID=^^^"de94bba4-06d1-4d40-a16a-bfd50179d6ac^^^"&echo:echo:GPT ATTRIBUTES=0x8000000000000001&echo:^)&echo:^>X:\MBR.txt ()

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:SELECT DISK=0&echo:echo:CLEAN&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY SIZE=300&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"System^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=S&echo:echo:ACTIVE&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:SHRINK MINIMUM=1000&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Windows^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=W&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Recovery^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=R)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:SET ID=27&echo:^)&echo:wpeutil.exe UpdateBootInfo&echo:for /f ^"tokens=3^" ^%^%t in ('reg.exe query HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control /v PEFirmwareType'^) do (&echo:if ^%^%t == 0x1 (&echo:set ^"LAYOUT=MBR^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:^) else if ^%^%t == 0x2 (&echo:set ^"LAYOUT=GPT^"&echo:^) else (&echo:call :fail ^"Unexpected value ^%^%t.^"&echo:^)&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"The target disk will be configured with the ^%LAYOUT^% partition layout^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"diskpart will now partition and format your disk^"&echo:diskpart.exe /s X:\^%LAYOUT^%.txt ^|^| call :fail ^"diskpart.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:set ^"IMG_PARAM=/Name:^"Windows 11 Pro^"^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Applying Windows image to target disk^"&echo:dism.exe /Apply-Image /ImageFile:^%IMAGE_FILE^% ^%SWM_PARAM^% ^%IMG_PARAM^% /ApplyDir:W:\ /CheckIntegrity /Verify ^|^| call :fail ^"dism.exe encountered an error.^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Making system partition bootable^"&echo:bcdboot.exe W:\Windows /s S: ^|^| call :fail ^"bcdboot.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:bcdedit.exe /set {fwbootmgr} bootsequence {bootmgr})

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Copying answer file to target disk^"&echo:mkdir W:\Windows\Panther&echo:copy ^%XML_FILE^% W:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER ()

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Adding drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder to new installation^"&echo:dism.exe /Add-Driver /Image:W:\ /Driver:^"^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^%^" /Recurse&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"Setting time zone^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Image:W:\ /Set-TimeZone:^"AUS Eastern Standard Time^"&echo:call :print ^"Disabling 8.3 file names^"&echo:fsutil.exe 8dot3name set W: 1&echo:fsutil.exe 8dot3name strip /s /f W:\)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Setting device setup region to Australia (GeoID 12^)^"&echo:reg.exe LOAD HKLM\mount W:\Windows\System32\config\SOFTWARE)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:reg.exe ADD ^"HKLM\mount\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Control Panel\DeviceRegion^" /v DeviceRegion /t REG_DWORD /d 12 /f&echo:reg.exe UNLOAD HKLM\mount&echo:call :print ^"Computer will now reboot^"&echo:wpeutil.exe reboot)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:goto :eof&echo::fail&echo:echo:&echo:echo:Fatal error: ^%~1&echo:echo:&echo:pause&echo:exit 1&echo::print&echo:echo:&echo:echo:*** ^%~1 ***&echo:echo:&echo:goto :eof)
cmd.exe /c "X:\pe.cmd"

powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -NoProfile -Command "$xml = [xml]::new(); $xml.Load('C:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml'); $sb = [scriptblock]::Create( $xml.unattend.Extensions.ExtractScript ); Invoke-Command -ScriptBlock $sb -ArgumentList $xml;"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\Specialize.ps1"
reg.exe load "HKU\DefaultUser" "C:\Users\Default\NTUSER.DAT"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\DefaultUser.ps1"
reg.exe unload "HKU\DefaultUser"

Extensions.File:
$AssetTag = Read-Host "Enter asset tag: " $TopsNum = Read-Host "Enter Tops#: " $SellerCode = Read-Host "Enter seller code: " $VenueCode = Read-Host "Enter venue code:"
$DeviceName = "TCW11${VenueCode}-${AssetTag}" Rename-Computer -NewName $DeviceName
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('TEG_ASSET_TAG', $AssetTag, 'Machine') [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('TEG_TOPS_NUM', $TopsNum, 'Machine') [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('TEG_SELLER_CODE', $SellerCode, 'Machine') [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('TEG_SITE_CODE', $SiteCode, 'Machine')
